---
title: "LQAS Monitoring Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: flatly
    source_code: embed
    self_contained: true
    navbar:
      - { title: "Overview", icon: "fa-dashboard" }
      - { title: "District Analysis", icon: "fa-map-marker" }
      - { title: "Performance", icon: "fa-chart-line" }
      - { title: "Data Explorer", icon: "fa-table" }
params:
  data_file: "data/final/lqas_cleaned.parquet"
  run_date: !r Sys.Date()
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)

load_data <- function(file_path) {
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    dt <- tryCatch({
      as.data.table(read_parquet(file_path))
    }, error = function(e) {
      csv_file <- sub("\\\\.parquet$", ".csv", file_path)
      if (file.exists(csv_file)) {
        fread(csv_file)
      } else {
        NULL
      }
    })
    return(dt)
  }
  return(NULL)
}

dt <- load_data(params$data_file)
data_available <- !is.null(dt) && nrow(dt) > 0

if (data_available) {
  if ("lqas_start_date" %in% names(dt)) {
    dt[, lqas_start_date := as.Date(lqas_start_date)]
  } else if ("start_date" %in% names(dt)) {
    dt[, lqas_start_date := as.Date(start_date)]
  }
  
  dt[, coverage_pct := round(total_vaccinated / total_sampled * 100, 1)]
  dt[, pass_status := ifelse(total_missed <= 3, "PASS", "FAIL")]
  
  countries <- unique(dt$country) %>% sort()
  vaccine_types <- unique(dt$vaccine.type) %>% na.omit() %>% sort()
  afro_blocks <- unique(dt$afro_block) %>% na.omit() %>% sort()
  
  global_metrics <- dt[, .(
    total_districts = uniqueN(district),
    total_clusters = sum(number_clusters, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_sampled = sum(total_sampled, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_vaccinated = sum(total_vaccinated, na.rm = TRUE),
    pass_rate = round(sum(pass_status == "PASS", na.rm = TRUE) / .N * 100, 1),
    mean_coverage = round(mean(coverage_pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
  )]
  
  latest_date <- max(dt$lqas_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

Sidebar {.sidebar}
=====================================

### **LQAS Dashboard**
*Polio Vaccination Monitoring*

```{r sidebar-info, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  cat(paste0("**Data as of:** ", format(params$run_date, "%B %d, %Y")))
  cat("\n\n")
  cat(paste0("**Latest LQAS:** ", format(latest_date, "%B %d, %Y")))
  cat("\n\n")
  cat(paste0("**Records:** ", format(nrow(dt), big.mark = ",")))
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  cat("### Key Metrics\n\n")
  cat(paste0("- **Coverage:** ", global_metrics$mean_coverage, "%"))
  cat("\n")
  cat(paste0("- **Pass Rate:** ", global_metrics$pass_rate, "%"))
  cat("\n")
  cat(paste0("- **Districts:** ", format(global_metrics$total_districts, big.mark = ",")))
}
```

### Filters

```{r filters, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  selectInput("country_filter", "Country:", choices = c("All", countries), selected = "All")
  selectInput("afro_block_filter", "AFRO Block:", choices = c("All", afro_blocks), selected = "All")
  selectInput("vaccine_filter", "Vaccine Type:", choices = c("All", vaccine_types), selected = "All")
  dateRangeInput("date_range", "Date Range:",
                 start = min(dt$lqas_start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
                 end = max(dt$lqas_start_date, na.rm = TRUE))
}
```

Overview
=====================================

Row {.value-boxes}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Coverage
```{r coverage-value, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  valueBox(paste0(global_metrics$mean_coverage, "%"), icon = "fa-heartbeat",
           color = ifelse(global_metrics$mean_coverage >= 90, "success", 
                          ifelse(global_metrics$mean_coverage >= 75, "warning", "danger")))
} else { valueBox("N/A", icon = "fa-heartbeat") }
```

### Pass Rate
```{r pass-rate, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  valueBox(paste0(global_metrics$pass_rate, "%"), icon = "fa-check-circle",
           color = ifelse(global_metrics$pass_rate >= 80, "success",
                          ifelse(global_metrics$pass_rate >= 60, "warning", "danger")))
} else { valueBox("N/A", icon = "fa-check-circle") }
```

### Districts
```{r districts-count, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  valueBox(format(global_metrics$total_districts, big.mark = ","), icon = "fa-map-marker", color = "info")
} else { valueBox("N/A", icon = "fa-map-marker") }
```

### Children Sampled
```{r sampled-count, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  valueBox(format(global_metrics$total_sampled, big.mark = ","), icon = "fa-child", color = "primary")
} else { valueBox("N/A", icon = "fa-child") }
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Coverage by Country
```{r coverage-plot, echo=FALSE, fig.height=6}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$afro_block_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[afro_block == input$afro_block_filter]
  if (input$vaccine_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[vaccine.type == input$vaccine_filter]
  
  country_sum <- filtered[, .(coverage = mean(coverage_pct, na.rm = TRUE)), by = country][order(-coverage)]
  
  ggplot(country_sum, aes(x = reorder(country, coverage), y = coverage, fill = coverage)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") + coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", mid = "orange", high = "green", midpoint = 75) +
    labs(x = "", y = "Coverage (%)") + theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
} else { cat("No data available") }
```

### AFRO Block Performance
```{r block-plot, echo=FALSE, fig.height=6}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$vaccine_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[vaccine.type == input$vaccine_filter]
  
  block_sum <- filtered[, .(coverage = mean(coverage_pct, na.rm = TRUE)), by = afro_block][order(-coverage)]
  
  ggplot(block_sum, aes(x = afro_block, y = coverage, fill = afro_block)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") + geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(coverage, 1), "%")), vjust = -0.5) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") + labs(x = "AFRO Block", y = "Coverage (%)") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
} else { cat("No data available") }
```

District Analysis
=====================================

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Coverage Trend Over Time
```{r trend-plot, echo=FALSE, fig.height=5}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$afro_block_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[afro_block == input$afro_block_filter]
  if (input$vaccine_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[vaccine.type == input$vaccine_filter]
  
  filtered[, month := floor_date(lqas_start_date, "month")]
  monthly <- filtered[, .(coverage = mean(coverage_pct, na.rm = TRUE)), by = month][order(month)]
  
  ggplot(monthly, aes(x = month, y = coverage)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.2, color = "#3498db") + geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 90, linetype = "dashed", color = "green") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 75, linetype = "dashed", color = "orange") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) + labs(x = "Month", y = "Coverage (%)") +
    theme_minimal()
} else { cat("No data available") }
```

### Reasons for Missed Children
```{r reasons-plot, echo=FALSE, fig.height=5}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$afro_block_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[afro_block == input$afro_block_filter]
  
  reason_cols <- c("r_Non_Compliance", "r_House_not_visited", "r_childabsent", "r_Child_was_asleep")
  reason_cols <- reason_cols[reason_cols %in% names(filtered)]
  
  if (length(reason_cols) > 0) {
    reasons <- filtered[, lapply(.SD, sum, na.rm = TRUE), .SDcols = reason_cols]
    reasons <- data.table(Reason = c("Non-Compliance", "House Not Visited", "Child Absent", "Child Asleep")[1:length(reason_cols)],
                          Count = as.numeric(reasons[1, ]))[Count > 0]
    
    ggplot(reasons, aes(x = reorder(Reason, Count), y = Count, fill = Count)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") + coord_flip() + labs(x = "", y = "Count") +
      theme_minimal() + geom_text(aes(label = Count), hjust = -0.2) + theme(legend.position = "none")
  } else { cat("Reason data not available") }
} else { cat("No data available") }
```

Performance
=====================================

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Top Performing Districts
```{r top-districts, echo=FALSE, fig.height=6}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$afro_block_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[afro_block == input$afro_block_filter]
  
  top10 <- filtered[order(-coverage_pct)][1:10, .(district, coverage_pct, pass_status)]
  
  ggplot(top10, aes(x = reorder(district, coverage_pct), y = coverage_pct, fill = pass_status)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") + coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("PASS" = "#2ecc71", "FAIL" = "#e74c3c")) +
    labs(x = "", y = "Coverage (%)") + theme_minimal() +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(coverage_pct, "%")), hjust = -0.2)
} else { cat("No data available") }
```

### Districts Needing Attention
```{r bottom-districts, echo=FALSE, fig.height=6}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$afro_block_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[afro_block == input$afro_block_filter]
  
  bottom10 <- filtered[order(coverage_pct)][1:10, .(district, coverage_pct, pass_status)]
  
  ggplot(bottom10, aes(x = reorder(district, -coverage_pct), y = coverage_pct, fill = pass_status)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") + coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("PASS" = "#2ecc71", "FAIL" = "#e74c3c")) +
    labs(x = "", y = "Coverage (%)") + theme_minimal() +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(coverage_pct, "%")), hjust = -0.2)
} else { cat("No data available") }
```

Data Explorer
=====================================

### District-Level Data Explorer
```{r data-table, echo=FALSE}
if (data_available) {
  filtered <- dt
  if (input$country_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[country == input$country_filter]
  if (input$afro_block_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[afro_block == input$afro_block_filter]
  if (input$vaccine_filter != "All") filtered <- filtered[vaccine.type == input$vaccine_filter]
  
  display <- filtered[, .(
    Country = country, `AFRO Block` = afro_block, Province = province, District = district,
    Campaign = response, Round = roundNumber, `Start Date` = as.Date(lqas_start_date),
    `Clusters` = number_clusters, `Sampled` = total_sampled, `Vaccinated` = total_vaccinated,
    `Missed` = total_missed, `Coverage` = paste0(round(coverage_pct, 1), "%"), `Status` = pass_status
  )][order(`Start Date`, decreasing = TRUE)]
  
  datatable(display, extensions = "Buttons",
            options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "Bfrtip",
                           buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf"))) %>%
    formatStyle("Coverage", background = styleColorBar(c(0, 100), "lightgreen")) %>%
    formatStyle("Status", backgroundColor = styleEqual(c("PASS", "FAIL"), c("#d4edda", "#f8d7da")))
} else { cat("No data available") }
```
